title: 疑問詞 + S + V（間接問句）

formulas.formula: S + V + wh- + S + V（直述句語序）
formulas.zh: 主詞 + 動詞 + 疑問詞 + 主詞 + 動詞，間接問句使用直述句語序，不倒裝

formulas.formula: S + V + wh- + S + V + O/C（擴展形式）
formulas.zh: 間接問句可包含受詞或補語，整體句型保持直述語序

explanation: 間接問句（indirect question）是以名詞子句形式出現的疑問，由know、wonder、tell、ask等動詞引導。關鍵特徵是wh-疑問詞後接直述句語序（主詞+動詞），不需倒裝。這與直接問句（Do you know where is the station?為誤用）形成對比。常用於報導或詢問他人資訊時，使語氣更婉轉禮貌。務必區分：直接問句倒裝，間接問句不倒裝。

examples.eng: I don't know what time the meeting starts tomorrow.
examples.chi: 我不知道明天會議幾點開始。

examples.eng: Can you tell me where your friend lives in Taipei?
examples.chi: 你能告訴我你朋友住在台北哪裡嗎？

examples.eng: She wondered why he didn't attend the important conference.
examples.chi: 她想知道他為什麼沒有參加那場重要的會議。

examples.eng: Ask him how long he has been working for that company.
examples.chi: 問他在那家公司工作多久了。

extension.tip: 區分直接問句與間接問句的語序：直接問句需倒裝（Where does he live?），間接問句用直述句語序（I know where he lives）。記住wh-疑問詞後面跟著正常的主詞+動詞順序，不要將直接問句的倒裝套用於間接問句。

examples.test: ❌ I don't know where does he come from. / ✓ I don't know where he comes from.
examples.result: → 間接問句中『where he comes from』使用直述句語序，不倒裝『does he』

examples.test: ❌ Can you tell me what time starts the movie? / ✓ Can you tell me what time the movie starts?
examples.result: → 『what time the movie starts』為間接問句，『the movie』是主詞應置於『starts』之前

examples.test: ✓ I wonder why she didn't come to the party. / ❌ I wonder why didn't she come to the party.
examples.result: → 『why she didn't come』為間接問句語序，過去式否定形式『didn't』跟在主詞後

extension.note: 間接問句口訣：『問詞後面接直述，主詞動詞不倒裝』

exercises.sentence: I want to know who your English teacher is, and when the exam will be held.
exercises.translation: 我想知道誰是你的英文老師，以及考試什麼時候舉行。

exercises.sentence: Can you tell me how you finished this difficult project?
exercises.translation: 你能告訴我你怎樣完成這個困難的專案嗎？

parts: I had been living in this city, and
exercises.sentence: She asked me how long I had been living in this city, and whether I liked it.
exercises.translation: 她問我在這個城市住了多久，以及我是否喜歡它。

parts: such an important place in the region.
exercises.sentence: Nobody understood why the ancient temple was such an important place in the region.
exercises.translation: 沒有人明白為什麼那座古廟在該地區是如此重要的地方。
